platform.name: Hermetika
platform.tagline: A curated pantheon of esoteric models, self-hosted on owned NVIDIA hardware.
platform.auth: Customer bearer key on /v1 (Authorization: Bearer <key>). Per-customer keys issued on Stripe subscribe (in progress).

backends.spark-1: owned DGX Spark GB10, hot lane, Ollama behind bearer-auth Caddy over Tailscale
backends.spark-2: owned DGX Spark GB10, breadth + failover twin

categories.label: Esoteric
categories.desc: Occult, hermetic, uncensored — the pantheon's soul.

categories.label: Music (ABC)
categories.desc: Emits ABC notation → renders to playable audio.

palette_note: Do NOT hardcode hex. Pull exact values for plates 234/235/238/239 from Eri's token file tokens/sanzo-wada.css and expose as CSS custom properties.

models_live.name: Hermes Trismegistus
models_live.blurb: Teknium's occult expert — first open LLM devoted to the esoteric, occult, alchemy, tarot, hermeticism. Namesake of the pantheon.
models_live.sample_prompt: Explain the principle of correspondence from the Kybalion.

models_live.name: Hermes 3 (3B)
models_live.blurb: Nous Hermes 3 finetune of Llama-3.2-3B — steerable, function-calling, roleplay. The dynasty's fast heir.
models_live.sample_prompt: You are a helpful assistant. Draft a 3-step plan to learn tarot.

models_live.name: Abliterate Mini
models_live.sample_prompt: Give an unfiltered take on the ethics of alchemy.

models_live.name: Trismegistus (OG)
models_live.blurb: The original occult-expert Mistral finetune, ancestor of Hermes Trismegistus. Kept for the dynasty lineage.
models_live.sample_prompt: Describe the four stages of the alchemical magnum opus.

models_live.name: Abliterate 3B
models_live.blurb: Refusal-ablated Qwen2.5-3B — the larger uncensored sibling.
models_live.sample_prompt: Write a candid short essay on forbidden knowledge.

models_live.name: TinyStories
models_live.blurb: A 15M-param TinyLlama that writes coherent simple stories — proof small can be magical.
models_live.sample_prompt: Once upon a time, a small robot

models_live.name: ASCII Artist
models_live.blurb: Llama-3-8B finetuned to draw with characters. System prompt: 'Make ASCII art of X'.
models_live.sample_prompt: Make ASCII art of a cat

models_roadmap.name: ASCII Star
models_roadmap.note: GGUF import into Ollama failed; needs a clean quant. Draws with characters.

models_roadmap.name: Kaomoji
models_roadmap.note: Laces every reply with kaomoji. Safetensors → needs GGUF conversion.

models_roadmap.name: GPT-2 Chess
models_roadmap.note: ~1340 Elo, 98.5% legal moves. Measurable demo number.

models_roadmap.name: MazeGPT
models_roadmap.note: Generates/solves text mazes. Smallest in the pantheon.

models_roadmap.name: Tunesformer
models_roadmap.note: Irish folk tunes in ABC notation → renders to playable MIDI. Big UI-playground win.

models_roadmap.name: NotaGen
models_roadmap.note: Classical sheet music in ABC. Needs its own repo code, not vanilla AutoModel.

ui_notes.dynasty_graph: hermes-trismegistus is the lineage root; hermes-3-mini and trismegistus-og descend from it. Render as a small dynasty tree.
ui_notes.lane_badge: Show which Spark each model lives on (spark-1 hot / spark-2 breadth). Failover twins.
ui_notes.playground: Seed each model card's playground with its sample_prompt.
ui_notes.roadmap_display: Show models_roadmap as 'coming soon' cards, grouped by category, so the pantheon reads full even before conversion.
ui_notes.aesthetic: techo-digital hardware-panel × liquid-metal; 0px radius structural; Sanzo Wada plates 234/235/238/239 via CSS vars; safety-gated motion only (no flash/strobe), honor prefers-reduced-motion.
